allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"jpalacios@smartbeemo.com","nombre":"Jessica Palacios","password":"CambiameAhora123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://cobros-dashboard.vercel.app/api/setup" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body; $r } catch { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | ForEach-Object { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) } })
